title: validator-guided constrained decoding (diagnostic) — REJECTED
note: MEASURED (scripts/diag_constrained.py, n=200/fold): only ~3pct of OOD top-1 errors are grammar-INVALID; ~97pct are grammar-VALID-but-wrong. Constrained masking cannot fix valid-but-wrong picks -> NO OOD benefit. REJECTED. (Corrects an earlier erroneous 52pct figure that was never actually computed.)
